calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emily Rich, Esq. 510-337-1001 of Weisberg Roger & Rosenfeld for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Plaintiff explains fees and costs and submits a proposed order. The Court will consider fees and costs. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Grant. No opposition filed. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
